feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: F107 - BTE 2750 Not able to change accounts in reversal document
entry.content:
Hi Team,

As part of business requirement we would need to change the accounts for posting for 98 method. for special case like management judgement we need to modify the posting account for open items. We tried using BTE 2750 which helped changing the forward posting and we are not able to change posting in the reversal document

entry.title: Query on report Asset History Report (S_ALR_87011990)
entry.content:
Hi SAP Team,

 

We are currently transferring assets within the same company code using transaction code ABUMN. As a part of the business requirement, we need to change the old cost center to new cost center for the US region. Here business is following bonus depreciation and we need a clarity while doing the asset transfer how the depreciation values to be posted to the new asset.

 

After completing the transfer and posting depreciation, we reviewed the Asset History Report (S_ALR_87011990) for depreciation areas XX with the report date of 31.05.2026. We observed the following:

 

  • Success case -For the another deactivated asset XXXXXX (Company Code XXXX, the report shows a net book value of zero.
  • Failure case - For the deactivated asset XXXXX (Company Code XXXX), the report continues to display a current net book value

entry.title: SAP S/4HANA Simulator — Practice SPRO and FI/SD transactions without a real system
entry.content:
**SAP S/4HANA Simulator — Practice SPRO and FI/SD transactions without a real system**

Hey everyone,

I built a web-based SAP S/4HANA simulator for consultants and students who want to practice configuration and transactions but don't have access to a real system.

The core idea: every transaction validates exactly against your SPRO configuration — just like real SAP. If something isn't configured, you get the same error message SAP would give you, pointing to the exact SPRO node and tcode to fix it.

**What's currently available:**

FI-AR: FB70, FB75, FB03, FB02, FB08, F-28, F-32, FBL5N
FI-AP: FB60, FB65, FBL1N, F-53, F-44, F110
SD: VA01, VA02, VA03
Credit Management (FSCM): FCV3, UKM007, UKM_CASE, UKM_DISPUTE
Master Data: FS00 (GL Accounts), BP (Business Partners with roles FLCU00/01, FLVN00, UKM000)
SPRO/IMG tree: OX02, OB29, OB37, OB52, OBA7, OB13, FTXP, OBB8 and more
SE16N Table Browser (BKPF, BSEG, ACDOCA, KNA1, LFA1 and 15 more tables)

**Free plan** includes a pre-configured environment (company code AR00, FY variant K4, tax codes, doc types) so you can start posting documents immediately without any setup.

Would love feedback from the community — especially on SAP accuracy. If something doesn't behave exactly like the real system, I want to know.

https://www.s4simulator.com

entry.title: Issues with CWIP line item
entry.content:
Hi SAP Team,

Our cutover activity date is 31.03.2026. We have CWIP assets where the asset is maintained as an investment measure.

We created Internal Orders using LSMW, with a one-to-one relationship between Internal Orders and Assets (1 Internal Order = 1 Asset). We are able to create the Internal Orders and upload the G/L balances (primary cost postings) without any issues.

However, when we attempt to perform settlement using KO88 or KO8G, we receive the following error message:

"You cannot post to this fixed asset; fiscal year already closed."

In transaction OAAQ, the highest fiscal year is maintained as 2026 and the closed fiscal year is 2025. We are unable to reopen fiscal year 2025.

Could you please advise how we can perform the settlement in fiscal year 2025.Since we are unable to open the fiscal year, we would like to understand the correct approach, as we need to verify the trial balance as of 31.03.2026.

SAP DEV 220 system for testing.

Regards,

entry.title: stock removal not happening while doing MIGO because stock is available at plant level
entry.content: While performing MIGO using movement type 551, the system is displaying a batch-related error. The stock was originally available only at the plant level because batch management was not enabled when the material was received through movement type 101. Later, the user updated the material master and activated batch management. Now, when attempting to remove the existing stock, the system throws the error "Enter Batch" because the stock was created without batch information.

entry.title: ML Physical Inventory Procedure, "Bin is outside of MRL period."- for interval 1
entry.content: For ML Physical Inventory Procedure, the interval/periodicity has been maintained as 1 day. After the completion of the physical inventory process, when attempting to create a new PI document for the same storage bin after 1 day, the system does not allow document creation.The application log displays the message:"Bin is outside of MRL period."

entry.title: Shipping type priority in alternative based confirmation
entry.content:
Hello all, is there a way in alternative based confirmation to prioritize shipping type?

Scenario: there is no availability in preferred plant, but in alternative plants, the same delivery time and overall delivery time is set. But with different transportation mode.

Is there an option to prioritize truck over air when both transport modes are having the same delivery time?

 

Thank you,

 

Martin

entry.title: Unable to get ISBP number in DMEE file
entry.content:
Hi SAP Team,

We are configured Brazill DMEE structure but required ISBP code to get into payment file but there is no field available in standard SAP to get into the file. Let us know how to get ISBP number in DMEE file and find the attachment for your reference.

Regards:

Amaresh

entry.title: In MB51, for movement type 413 E, some materials are showing a value of zero
entry.content:
In MB51, for movement type 413 E, some materials are showing a value of zero while others are displaying a value amount.

Kindly guide me on the reason for this difference and help clarify the issue.

entry.title: Immediate Auto UD after result recording is not working for EWM inspection lot
entry.content:
Hi,

Automatic usage decision (Immediate post result recording) is not working for inspection lot origin 17.

Thanks & Regards,

entry.title: The end date is taking after 636 days in inspction lot
entry.content:
Subject: Clarification on Inspection Lot End Date Calculation for Material FR10603I62 (Plant 1056)

Description:

Hello Team,

We have observed an issue with the inspection lot end date calculation in SAP for the below material:

  • Material: FR10603I62
  • Plant: 1056

Issue Details:

  • The system is currently calculating the inspection end date as 636 days from the start date.
  • However, as per the material master settings, the Average Inspection Duration maintained is 540 days (in the relevant inspection type).

Concern:

  • Based on our understanding, the inspection end date should be derived using the Average Inspection Duration maintained in the material master.
  • However, the system is calculating a significantly higher duration (636 days), and the logic b

entry.title: Operative indicator Account Assignment check box not displaying at WBS Element Basic Data tab
entry.content: Operative indicator Account Assignment check box not displaying. Even though the field selection for Account Assignment is configured as Display in OPUK, the Account Assignment Check box is not displayed at WBS Element Basic Data tab

entry.title: Material can no longer be changed
entry.content:
Issue: Material cannot be changed.

Error: An error is encountered while attempting to change the material in the PO, both manually and via BAPI in SAP.

Details:

  • PO status: Goods Receipt (GR) completed and subsequently reversed.
  • System does not allow modification of the material after GR completion.

entry.title: SAP BAS Deployment Issue - Request for Support
entry.content:
Hi Team

Requirement

Need to deploy SAP Fiori application from Business Application Studio (BAS) to ABAP system using deployment configuration.

Environment

SAP Business Application Studio (BAS)

Node.js environment

Fiori tools (@sap/fiori)

Target: ABAP

Steps Performed

1. Open BAS terminal

2. Navigate to project directory

3. Run deployment configuration command

CLI Command Used

npm run deploy-config

Observed Behavior

While adding deployment configuration, system throws error during ABAP target selection.

Error Details

Request failed with status code 404

TypeError [ERR_INVALID_ARG_TYPE]: The "code" argument must be of type number. Received type string ('ERR_BAD_REQUEST')

Expected Behavior

Deployment configuration should be added successfully and allow deployment to ABAP system.

Additional Notes

System prompts to install @SAP/generator-fiori globally, however issue persists.

entry.title: 購買発注(ME21N)の「個人設定」の初期値が設定されてしまっている
entry.content:
SAPサポートご担当者様

以下2点について内容のご確認と対応方法のご教授をいただきたく思います。
①購買発注(ME21N)の「個人設定」の初期値が意図せず登録されており、想定と異なる購買組織で発注する動きとなる。
⇒「個人設定」の初期値が設定された理由をご教授いただきたい。

②SU01のユーザの変更文書からパラメータの変更履歴を確認することができない。
⇒ユーザのパラメータ変更履歴の確認方法をご教授いただきたい。

以上2点ご確認のほどよろしくお願いいたします。

entry.title: Need Assistance in Checking the Feasibility of Increasing the Decimal Values.
entry.content:
In transaction code AR29N (Revaluation/New Valuation of Assets), under the tab Index-Based New Valuation, we have a requirement to increase the decimal precision. Currently, the system appears to allow only 2 decimal places.

For example:
Index Value: 10.34321

  However, in the Index for New Valuation of Assets field under the Index Base New Valuation tab, the system only accepts 10.34 instead of 10.34321 which results deviation in expected output.

Could you please provide a solution to increase the decimal count for this field?

 

Thanks & Regards,

Yash K

entry.title: Issue in BAPI_SALESORDER_SIMULATE for mass number of records
entry.content: We are trying to process mass data in BAPI BAPI_SALESORDER_SIMULATE but we are not getting return message with particular material to skip that record

entry.title: Error to Change User Id in Flexible Workflow on Purchase Order in Fiori
entry.content:
While Changing User ID by copying in Flexible Workflow on Purchase Order in Fiori it shows the error that User are not valid.

Also let me Know How User ID has to be maintained in GUI.

entry.title: GBP vs USD currency total not matching with exchange rate
entry.content:
Dear Team,

For W102 company code GL account 70502010, there are 38 lineitems.

  • Local Currency (LC1): GBP
  • Local Currency 2 (LC2): USD
  • At the individual line-item level, the calculated exchange rate (USD/GBP) is approximately 1.31, with slight variations due to daily exchange rate fluctuations.

Issue observed:

  1. when we are totaling of 38line items and doing USD/GBP the rate is -8.79, which differs significantly from the line-item exchange rates. 

      2. GBP total -21,150.08 and the USD total in positive 185,929.08,

Please help on above queries.

Excel attached for reference

Regards,

Prasanna.K

entry.title: Physical Inventory Progress showing all activity areas
entry.content:
Hello

The Physical Inventory Progress on the monitor shows status completed for a product for all activity areas even if the product is only stored in one activity area?

/scwm/mon

Physical Inventory > Physical Inventory Progress > Product

Product
